message:
Merge pull request #1622 from kubestellar/cncf-mission/operator-framework-2042-crd-generation-via-generate-openapi-does-not-surface-err

🌱 operator-framework: CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface errors for invalid tags

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "operator-framework-2042-crd-generation-via-generate-openapi-does-not-surface-err",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "operator-framework: CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface errors for invalid tags",
+    "description": "CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface errors for invalid tags. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify operator-framework troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your operator-framework deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review operator-framework configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework\n```\n## Bug Report\n\n**What did you do?**\nRun `operator-sdk generate openapi` for the following `pkg/apis/..._types.go` file that has the invalid marker comment `// +kubebuilderfoo=bar`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface…",
+        "description": "This should be fixed by #2201, which directly uses `controller-gen crd` API and surfaces errors appropriately.\n\nNote that `generate openapi` has been deprecated in favor of `generate crds`. A lot of these issues will go away now that `openapi-gen` is not longer run by default.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This should be fixed by #2201, which directly uses `controller-gen crd` API and surfaces errors appropriately.\n\nNote that `generate openapi` has been deprecated in favor of `generate crds`. A lot of these issues will go away now that `openapi-gen` is not longer run by default.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
